query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_eventos,
  SUM(CAST(doctor_amount_due AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_real,
  SUM(CASE WHEN doctor_received_at IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(doctor_amount_due AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_pago
FROM billing_visit_events
WHERE doctor_cycle_id = 150001 AND financial_status != 'cancelled';

SELECT reports_count, amount_due FROM billing_cycle_doctor_summary WHERE doctor_cycle_id = 150001;
